docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,579.91 FILED BY 400 W. 22ST. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT STOOKEY, JAKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 400 W. 22ST. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOOKEY, JAKE $499.41 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $549.41, *PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL AWARD OF $549.41 IS AN "OFFSET" REFLECTING EXPENSES DEFENDANT WAS ENTITLED TO.(PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL AWARD WAS $1910.05, MINUS DEFENDANT'S TOTAL AWARD OF $1360.64 = $549.41 FOR PLAINTIFF.) DEFENDANT TERMS AND ORDERS: THE REPAIR COSTS LACK TRUSTWORTHINESS AND PROPER FOUNDATION, HENCE DENIED. ALSO LATE FEES NOT IMPOSED SINCE NOT NOTICED AT THE TIME DUE. PLAINTIFF TERMS AND ORDERS: DEPOSIT PLUS INTEREST AT PRECENTAGE RATES APPLICABLE PER YEAR FROM TIME DEPOSIT RECEIVED FOR 2005-2008. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STOOKEY, JAKE HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
